hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Semtex - Remove the Git friction that is discouraging you from making improvements to your C# codebase

commands.name: split
commands.description: Partition uncommitted changes into two patch files: one for behavioural changes and one for quality improvements.

commands.name: split-remote
commands.description: Split a specific commit from a remote repository into two patch files: one for behavioural changes and one for quality improvements.

arguments.name: repo-url
arguments.description: Origin url of Git repository, including protocol (https, ssh, etc.).

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Branch or SHA containing the changes you want to split.

commands.name: check
commands.description: Analyze the specified remote repository and branch/commit to identify changes that will affect the program's runtime behaviour.

arguments.name: repo-url
arguments.description: Origin url of Git repository, including protocol (https, ssh, etc.).

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Branch or SHA containing the changes.

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Commits one of the partitions of your changes generated by the split commands

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Whether to commit behavioural changes or quality improvements.

commands.name: compute-project-file-map
commands.description: This command is a prerequisite if your codebase does not follow the standard hierarchical project layout. It generates a file that maps each C# file to its respective project.

arguments.name: sln-path
arguments.description: Path to local solution file. Accepts both absolute and relative paths.

arguments.name: output-file-path
arguments.description: Defines the path where the mapping will be saved.
